sections.heading: Session Structure
sections.markdown:
- Keep this supportive rather than additive. The main session of the block was the delayed threshold run on Wednesday.
- Focus on single-leg stability, hips, groin, calves, trunk control, and upper-body maintenance.
- Skip any heavy lower-body work, hard eccentrics, or anything that leaves soreness heading into the weekend.

sections.heading: Targets
sections.markdown:
- Leave the gym feeling more mobile and switched on, not drained.
- If the legs feel flat from the threshold session, make this a mobility-and-stability session only.
